prestazioni: Engine: M297 7.3L AMG V12 (naturally aspirated, 760PS/750hp at 7,500 RPM, 780Nm torque at 5,700 RPM) – full titanium valve springs (Titanium Racing Developments) and upgraded camshafts (Schrick 284° duration, 12.5mm lift) for extended 8,200 RPM redline with 10W-60 Motul 300V Trophy Ester oil.

Forced induction: Custom-built twin-turbo system (Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos, 1.2 bar boost) with bespoke Pagani-specific intercooler (PWR Australia, 1200hp-rated core) and titanium exhaust manifold (Capristo 3.5-inch diameter, Inconel 625 construction) feeding a straight-pipe Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust (4.5-inch outlets, carbon fiber tips).

Drivetrain: Xtrac P1152 7-speed sequential transaxle (paddle-shift, 50ms shifts) with upgraded carbon fiber clutch (Tilton ST-200 triple-plate, 1,200Nm capacity) and OS Giken Super Lock LSD (45% preload) paired with a custom 5.0:1 final drive ratio for 0-300 km/h in 16.8 seconds.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Pagani-designed 'Fiamma' aero package (carbon fiber, 300kg downforce at 250 km/h) featuring a fixed rear wing (1.2m chord, 3D-printed titanium endplates) and front splitter with active Gurney flaps (Bosch Motorsport ECU-controlled, 0-15mm extension).

Bodywork: Full carbon fiber body (Prepreg autoclave, 2x2 twill weave) with exposed titanium fasteners (Aerotight A286 alloy) and custom 'Liquid Metal' paint (PPG D8187, 5-layer process with 0.5mm flake size) over a bare carbon base.

Interior: Bespoke Alcantara/leather upholstery (Poltrona Frau 'Pelle Frau' leather, 1.2mm thickness) with titanium shift paddles (Brembo GT3-spec, anodized gold) and a digital dash (Motec C187, 10-inch OLED, 10,000Hz refresh rate) integrated into a carbon fiber steering wheel (OMP WRC, 320mm diameter, suede grip).
